scenes.narration: Tu agar ACID Properties With Real Examples samajh nahi paya, toh Razorpay ka ₹30-55LPA ka offer bhool ja.

The core mechanism of ACID Properties With Real Examples: it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
